stations.name: Tiszai
stations.instructions:
When a train arrives at A:
For a blue or yellow train, set path 1, C1.
For a red train, set path 1, C2.

When a train arrives at B1:
Set path 2, D.

When a train arrives at B2:
Set path 2, D.

Ignore signals D, C1, C2.

stations.name: Foter
stations.instructions:
When a train arrives at A: set path 1,2,3,D.

When a train arrives at B: set path 4. 

When a train arrives at C:
For a yellow train between game time 2:00 and 8:00, set path 5,2,1,4.
In all other cases, set path 5,3,D.

Ignore signal D.

stations.name: Szikra
stations.instructions:
For a train arriving at A:
Blue train: set path 1,2,3,C.
Yellow train: set path 1,5.

For a train arriving at B:
Blue and Yellow train: set path 4,D.
Red train: set path 4,3,2,5.

stations.name: Depot
stations.instructions:
Between times 2:00 and 8:00 in the game day: Set 1 to East, outside these times set 1 to South-East.

If a train arrives at A: set path 2, C.
If a train arrives at B between 2:00 and 8:00: set path 2, C.
If a train arrives at B before 2:00 or after 8:00: wait until 2:00, then set path 2, C.

Ignore signal C.
